title: Manual
text: package ‘CoordFixR’ calculates converts coordinates (almost) possible notations decimal degrees. matter whether characters letters degrees, minutes seconds included (e.g. “°” “degree”), whether spaces, underscores slashes occur, whether designations “North”, “South”, “West” “East” minus signs (“-”) included. Coordinates contain text components ‘degrees’, ‘minutes’ ‘seconds’ also correctly converted decimal degree notation without problems.

title: Coordinate Converter Web Application
text: Description Functions Installation Usage Examples Author Changelog Contact

title: Coordinate Converter Web Application
text: CoordFixR package provides R Shiny App processes coordinates variety notations converts decimal degrees (see Examples). supports wide range formats, including - degree, minute second symbols (°, ‘,’‘), - specification word form ’degree’, ‘minutes’, seconds’ - abbreviations (‘deg’, ‘min’, ‘sec’). Typos slight changes: Even spelling mistakes (e.g. ‘deegrees’) slight changes (e.g. ‘degree’ ‘Degrees’ instead ‘degrees’) processed app without problems. Different hemisphere designations:: app can also process different types hemisphere designations - ‘North N’, - ‘South S’, - ‘East E’ , - ‘West W’. app also correctly interprets simple minus signs (‘-’) southern western hemispheres. Separators: CoordFixR app can process various separators - spaces (e.g. -9° 5’ 23.5’‘), - slashes (e.g. -9°/5’/23.5’‘), - back slashes (e.g. -9°\5’\23.5’’), - underscores (e.g. -9°_5’_23.5’’) - combinations (e.g. 9°_5’_23.5’’) Leading zeros: app CoordFixR can also process coordinates contain leading zeros (e.g. -009° 05’23’’). Decimal separators: application accepts points (‘.’) commas (‘,’) decimal separators (‘-9 deg 5 min 23.5 sec’ ‘-9 deg 5 min 23,5 sec’). comma decimal separator widely used continental Europe (e.g. Germany, France, Italy, Poland, etc.) South America (e.g. Argentina, Chile, Brazil, etc.). new (converted) decimal degrees decimal point (e.g. -9.089861).

title: Coordinate Converter Web Application
text: Load Excel data: Users can select upload Excel file hard drive storage device. Column selections: Users can select columns loaded table contain geographical coordinates. Coordinate conversion app converts various coordinate formats (e.g. DMS, DDM) decimal degress (DD) creates new columns converted values. Visualisation: conversion, users can plot converted coordinates (points) interactive leaflet map visualize position. way, errors (e.g. confusion x y) incorrect missing hemisphere information can quickly recognized corrected. Interactivity: CoordFixR R-shiny application, user can change entries changes immediately displayed interactively. Results storage: modified table, now contains two new columns decimal coordinates, can saved user’s system Excel file. package designed simplify coordinate transfer users frequewntly deal mixed-format geographic data.

title: Coordinate Converter Web Application

title: Coordinate Converter Web Application
text: run app just type following command: library(CoordfixR) CoordfixR::launch_app()

title: Coordinate Converter Web Application
text: ‘48° 51’ 52.978” North’ converted ‘48.86471611111111’ ‘-22 degree 59 minutes 0 seconds’ converted ‘-22.98333333333333’ ‘W_38_deg_53_min_23.298_sec’ converted ‘-38.889805’ ‘S77 deg 0 min 32.6016 sec’ converted ‘-77.009056’ 460 different spellings coordinates tested converted decimal degrees.
